title: [Skyship, Research]
description: The area is unnaturally cold and slick, with frost and frozen water droplets visibly clinging to the room's metal surfaces.  The chill appears to emanate from a series of pale blue runes stamped on the bulkheads.  Placed below these runes and further stacked into piles across the area are an indeterminate number of corpses, each pale as if their blood has been fully drained.  Sealed wooden crates pushed against the bulkheads are labeled only with a single, pyrographed stick figure burned onto them.
